reviews.text: Brilliant attorney

The Kincaid Law Firm, PLLC was a lifesaver for my family and me when I had to file for Worker’s Compensation after being injured at work on August 24, 2023. As a federal employee and sole earner, I relied on my agency for guidance, but after weeks of delays and unaddressed concerns regarding crucial forms like CA-1 and CA-7, I found myself without medical care and facing financial strain.

Initially hesitant to hire a representative due to fears of retaliation, I eventually reached out for help. After interviewing over 80 law firms, I found The Kincaid Law Firm, PLLC. Ms. Kincaid responded promptly and offered a reasonable fee structure that allowed me to set up a manageable payment plan.

The firm quickly worked on my behalf, ensuring my claim was approved, adding additional conditions, and communicating with my agency to prevent inappropriate job offers. Ms. Kincaid was always available to address my questions.

My advice: don’t go through this process alone. Hiring The Kincaid Law Firm, PLLC has been essential to avoiding severe financial hardship for my family.

Thank you very much to The Kincaid Law Firm, PLLC!
J Garcia

**Update: August 2024** - "Ongoing Efforts to Address Inefficiencies in Monthly Payments with the Agency/OWCP." The Kincaid Law Firm, PLLC, has been tirelessly advocating for my rights and has done an exceptional job managing my case. Ms. Kincaid and her team successfully resolved the issues I encountered with the OWCP and the Agency, resulting in corrected monthly payments. As a result, my pay rate has significantly increased, reflecting what it should have been since I filed my worker's compensation claim. I was also awarded back pay, which has helped me reduce my credit card balance. I cannot express enough gratitude to the Kincaid Law Firm for helping me stay financially stable.

Thank you very much to The Kincaid Law Firm, PLLC!
J Garcia

**Update: November 21, 2024** – "Battle of Expansion Regarding My Work-Related Injuries" – I continue to be impressed with The Kincaid Law Firm, PLLC. Ms. Kincaid has successfully expanded my case by adding additional ICD codes to address my work-related injury, which may lead to surgery on my left shoulder. This development will help me return to work without pain and enable me to use my left shoulder and arm effectively.

Thank you very much to The Kincaid Law Firm, PLLC!
J Garcia

I was injured in an auto collision that was not my fault, and was not being dealt with fairly by either my insurance company or the other party's.  Ray Brooks fought hard for me and my rights, working diligently to ensure the best possible outcome. The Brooks Law Firm are true professionals providing their clients with great legal advice and representation.  They are great communicators, extremely responsive, and care about justice for their clients.  I couldn't recommend the firm more highly.

A respected neighbor gave me a recommendation, The Brooks Law Firm, for my two rear-end auto accidents that happened in less than a year of each other.

Right from the first appointment, Ray Brooks scrutinized the documentation that I brought, and asked many detailed questions as his wife and assistant, Polona, took notes.  He needed more information so I had my homework.

Ray plays to win; he assumes he's going to court and plans accordingly.  He doesn't just collect your accident information, file some papers, and go the final settlement meeting.  Ray had a general idea of the monetary worth of my case.  He and Polona have years of experience and know what they are doing. Polona kept track of all the paperwork and appointments, kept me updated, and explained what she needed and why without any pressure.

Ray explained what the next steps were.  He said what to expect and guided me through each step of the process:  the deposition where my testimony was recorded and transcribed for future use (the attorneys for the other two car accidents asked questions of me), and the recorded medical evaluation with a neurology doctor and an orthopedic surgeon which took two hours.

The day of the settlement meeting, the mediator went back and forth, not just once, not just twice, but at least five times between Ray, Polona, and myself in Ray's office, another room with the attorney & their client for the first accident and another room with the attorney & their client for the second accident.  I thought the end result was fair.

Because of my "outstanding medical and liens" to repay the insurance company, I would not have gotten that much; Ray negotiated with the insurance company for a much more favorable repayment rate.

I was very pleased with my settlement.

My wife worked for a Law Firm for 10 years and we truly believed they were the best of the best. We were wrong. When I need a litigator, I start and end with Ray Brooks. He is an expert litigator and zealous advocate who, in a couple of cases, has gotten better results for me than I expected. He and Polona step willingly into the line of fire and take care of issues that most people dread dealing with--managing hospitals, insurance companies, other lawyers, etc.  They have good hearts and willingly give their time to make sure matters are handled properly, including matters that are outside the scope of the pending case but are important to their clients. I could not recommend Ray Brooks more strongly.

3. … send only 1 final itemized invoice for over $20,000 in fees only after it was requested over 15 months of billing.
4.  … not verify the contents or value of a 50/50 estate distribution and sign a legal court document stating otherwise, when his office staff even said that the inventory was not accurate.
5.  … change his mind on how to handle the estate distribution because the other party disagreed.
6.  … misplace deceased sentimental items.
You have been warned.

reviews.text: I hired this firm to complete a medical practice acquisition contract. I had a Zoom meeting with the primary lawyer in late June 2023. He expressed to me they are well experienced in Medical law and could complete this contract in 3-4 weeks. As weeks went by, my business partner, the selling party, along with their respective lawyers, were getting very frustrated with the lack of communication from MDK law and the slow progress of the contract. The other parties repeatedly stated their lawyers had expressed to them this was a "boiler plate" contract and shouldn't take more than 2-3 weeks.  Remember they quoted me 3-4 weeks to complete the contract in late June 2023 and per their own billing statement, the first time they contacted the other party's lawyer was on 08/09/23. I would email them with questions, ask for updates and my emails would be ignored. Two weeks later they would send me an email, clearly having not read my emails, as my questions would remain unanswered. I paid the first bill in the amount of $1,665. This acquisition contract was holding up all other aspects of the new practice we were building including our credentialing, lease agreement and banking. I kept asking for updates and again incomplete replies 2 weeks later. They filed PLLC paperwork with WA state 2 months after I hired them, 4 weeks after the quoted timeline of completion of the contract, and they spelled my partner's name wrong on the official paperwork. I was charged $1,195 for that filing. Finally the selling party and their lawyer were very frustrated and contacted me on Sept 1st and gave us a deadline of Sept 8th to complete the purchasing agreement. I immediately emailed MDK Law and expressed the urgency of the matter and even called and spoke to their paralegal on the next business day. Afternoon of Sept 8th, they sent me an incomplete rough draft. It was too late to complete the transaction by end of business day on Sept 8th. They sent me an additional bill of $4,471. I emailed them expressing my frustration with their poor/delayed communication, our contract falling through and their overall unprofessionalism. They took no responsibility for missing their own deadline by 6+ weeks, accused me of inaccuracies, said I was the reason the contract fell through and threated me by letting me know they will send me to collections if I don't pay the remainder of the bill. I have paid the final bill for a total of $6,136. For that I got an incorrectly filed PLLC with WA state, no purchasing agreement, poor communication and unprofessionalism. Lastly our main competitor, who is also a client of theirs, reached out to the selling party in the middle of this transaction. The selling party of course was not happy about this. Save yourself the time, headache and money; find an alternative law firm that values their clients, their time, business and money; and not just their billing.

reviews.text:
RE: Courtney Bhatt

We want to express our deepest gratitude to Courtney Bhatt for her recent work on a complex special education issue in a rural school district in the greater Seattle area.  Our gentle, autistic child was in a miserable kindergarten situation in which she was repeatedly intimidated, humiliated and punished for autistic behaviors (including an inability to express herself verbally) by untrained staff assistants and a classroom teacher who inexplicably refused to fully incorporate the advice of autism experts. All polite attempts we made to address these issues ourselves failed. Add to this scenario a principal with a history of secretive behavior and a district special education director who routinely bullies and intimidates staff, students and parents.  It was an absolute mess and our young child suffered greatly—physically, mentally, and emotionally.  Moreover, the district placed our child and her disabled peers in a moldy classroom which sickened our child (as well as other children and staff) and then steadfastly refused to address the issue in a timely or thorough manner.

The good news is that all this changed when Courtney entered the equation. Courtney has polite, soft-spoken mannerisms but is firm and very authoritative. She sorted through the multiple violations of special education law and obtained a formal mold testing. This testing confirmed the existence of black mold and above average levels of several other types of mold in a few classrooms, including our daughter’s. Courtney skillfully navigated the unprofessional and unethical behaviors of two district administrators and certain school staff. She quickly negotiated a new school placement for our daughter with a compassionate teacher who understands autism.  Additionally, Courtney was instrumental in crafting a new IEP with goals and accommodations which made sense for our daughter.

Moreover, Courtney always actively listened to our many concerns regarding the matter. She always made time for us. Courtney is clearly a brilliant attorney who knows the law. Her responses to emails and phone calls were lightning-fast and she treated us with the utmost respect and regard.

Thanks to Courtney's intervention, our daughter's natural joy has returned and she finished her school year in an autism-friendly school with clean air! Our child is looking forward to returning to that same school in the fall. Courtney's work was so much more than just "legal help." Her advocacy on our daughter's behalf had a profound impact on a disabled child's QUALITY OF LIFE. We do not say this lightly. Special education lawyers advocate for so much more than just a good school setting or a decent IEP, they are advocating for the quality of life of some of the most vulnerable, innocent children in society who cannot speak for themselves.

We are forever grateful to Courtney for her strong moral compass and her skilled, compassionate advocacy on our daughter's behalf. It made all the difference in the life of one small child. Thank you, Courtney.

Navigating the U.S. immigration system is never easy—but my journey was filled with more curveballs than most. After several setbacks, missteps by my former employer, and years of uncertainty, I was running out of options and hope. That’s when I found Anca.

From our first conversation, Anca brought not just legal expertise, but clarity, strategy, and unwavering support. She assessed my incredibly complex situation with sharp insight and compassion, laying out a path forward that I hadn't thought possible—one that allowed me to secure my green card without having to leave the country.

Throughout the process, Anca guided me through every obstacle: recovering key documents from overseas, resolving a decades-old name change with no existing records, and proactively timing key steps in my application so it wouldn't be derailed by policy changes during a tumultuous political climate. Her depth of knowledge and strategic foresight were invaluable—especially in a system that often feels stacked against immigrants.

Today, I am thrilled (and incredibly relieved) to say that my green card has been approved. I owe this milestone to Anca's brilliance, tenacity, and genuine care. If you're looking for someone who will fight for you and think three steps ahead on your behalf, I cannot recommend Anca highly enough.

Mr. Ault demonstrated a remarkable level of dedication to my case and compassion throughout the entirety of my legal journey, which stretched over several challenging years. From the very beginning, he truly cared about achieving the best possible outcome for my case. He displayed the kind of determination and persistence anyone in my position would be blessed to have in their corner- despite the lengthy process and my periodic apprehension about what consequence I was comfortable with accepting. He was always so gracious and patient in every way when he spoke with me, (even if i might’ve been a bit of a stressful client).  Recognizing that my financial resources were limited, he sought guidance from various expert witnesses in the hopes they'd be able to contribute to my defense, seeking options for the state to assist in financing that representation, despite the fact that he was met with denials over and over. without further payment from me, no expert witness was willing to help with my case. regardless, the fact of the matter is that he looked into every avenue of additional support possible, even in the face of refusals on every end. He really did show up for me in every way and displayed so much empathy and understanding during such a stressful time.

My case involved accusation of DUI due to the prescribed medications I was taking. The distress I felt when I received a summons two years after being pulled over was overwhelming, it felt deeply unjust. Mr. Ault fought tirelessly on my behalf to seek a dismissal, but ultimately, the prosecution remained firm in insisting I faced charges. However, through relentless negotiation, he was able to secure a significant reduction of my charge from DUI to negligent driving, a result that I felt was fair given my circumstances. I accepted responsibility for the incident, acknowledging that a moment of being startled led to a dangerous maneuver.

This reduction was huge for me, as it meant I could avoid fines, jail time, and the daunting requirement of SR 22 insurance and an interlock device. Throughout the entire process, Mr. Ault showed an exemplary level of professionalism and empathy, guiding me through all the necessary steps of attending classes and meeting with evaluators. He always made it clear that my well-being was a priority, advocating for me and explaining the pros and cons of each option in front of me. He’d express his opinion on what he felt was my best option, but he never made me feel pressured into taking any plea deal.

Though the legal system has its flaws and options were somewhat limited, Mr. Ault's efforts led to a significant reduction in my initial charges. I genuinely believe that had I chosen to go to trial, he would have fought ceaselessly to prove my innocence to the jury aware of the risks. We made the right decision ultimately. I am incredibly grateful for his support and dedication, and I would recommend him to anyone in need of legal representation. As a young woman living with disabilities- the sympathy, understanding, and human decency he showed me throughout this process is a kindness I will always be so grateful for. Thank you, Mr. Ault, for your immeasurable support and guidance and for being such a compassionate, unwavering advocate during one of the most challenging times in my life.

Terrible employment attorneys lead you on for years saying you are apart of a lawsuit and when it comes time to get paid it turns out I wasn’t on the lawsuit to begin with
reviews.ownerResponse: We are sorry to hear about your frustration.  Although we never represented you in an employment matter, your frustration about being a member of a class action and then having the employer remove you is understandable.  We are still in the process of trying to find out more with the employer and ask for your patience as we continue to look into this issue for you.

reviews.text: This firm goes above and beyond to reach a legal and viable solution from day one, offering advice and console along the way. It is never easy to go through a lawsuit, but they fight to make sure you're heard and taken care of and I highly recommend working with Gregory and Kaitlyn especially.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for sharing your feedback. We are committed to advocating for every employee's rights and addressing discrimination in the workplace. We're glad to hear that you felt supported and well-advised throughout the process. Thank you for your feedback, and please know that we value your trust in our services.

reviews.text: Damien is smart, trustworthy, and an expert in his field. I felt confident handing my matter after working with him. If you need an employment attorney, start here.

We worked with Damien Vallarreal at Skidmore and Fomina, and could not have been happier with him. Damien is very thoughtful, straightforward, and was willing to take the time to listen. He let us know of the different options that were in front of us, and never tried to present something that was not realistic. Just simply having an ear and a heart for what we needed meant everything to us, and if you are looking for the right kind of attorney that can provide excellent expertise, but with the empathy and thoughtfulness that’s also needed, Damien is your guy. Thanks Damien!
reviews.ownerResponse: James, thank you for your kind words! We are so happy we have been able to assist you in your employment matter.

reviews.text: Vera helped me, and she was incredible. She was informative, highly responsive, and really easy to work with. I can’t recommend her enough.

Vera is top notch, excellent at communicating at where the case is and if she takes on your case she will WIN! She was able to settle my case in a short time and we never had to go to trial. Look no further if you are looking for an amazing attorney to fight for what is right!
reviews.ownerResponse: Peter, thank you for your feedback! It was such a pleasure working with you and we are happy we could provide you with the desired outcome.

reviews.text: I met Damien here urgently at Skidmore & Fomina about an employment matter. He was insanely good, very thorough, very detailed, gave me lots of confidence. My matter was quite complex, involving cutting edge tech and a sophisticated concern. Damien gave me all the time I wanted, made sure all of my questions were fully addressed. I would wholeheartedly recommend Damien, Employment law is the only law he practices (and he only defends the employee side). Thanks gain, Damien.

Gregory Skidmore is an honest attorney that worked hard for me,
stayed in contact kept me aware of everything going on with my case. Most importantly we won and Mr. Skidmore NEVER was anything but completely honest. I highly recommend Gregory Skidmore.

Greg and his team are invaluable.  As an individual we successfully took on a major corporation and it was wholly due to Greg and his diligence along the way that we won. Every piece of advice was spot on and led to a great conclusion to the events.  Not only is he the consummate professional he was also very good at putting me at ease throughout the process.  I cannot thank him enough.  I 100% recommend him and his team.  You will not be disappointed.

Mason & Greg were amazing!!! So helpful, understanding and empathetic to my horrible situation. Every communication I had with them they were extremely thorough, respectful and took a lot of time explaining things in a way that we could understand. I truly feel like we became friends- I could trust them. I’m so very thankful to them for helping us get some justice.
Thank you guys so much for everything. 10/10 service- would absolutely 100% recommend them to all.

Vera and Mason were excellent at advocating for me when I was wrongfully terminated. They were empathetic and listened which helped me during a very upsetting and stressful event. I was thankful they fought and got me a settlement I was happy with, and far more than I imagined I would get. Everyone I had spoken to at Skidmore & Fomina were friendly and answered my questions. I would have trusted any of them to represent me. I highly recommend this law firm!

Greg and Mason did a great job on my case especially since they opposing counsel was being quite difficult. They were very knowledgeable and straightforward with the facts with me. Highly recommend if you need an employment lawyer who will fight for you tooth and nail.

Damien provided excellent legal services for my matter. His expertise, responsiveness, and dedication were outstanding. He navigated the complexities with ease, communicated effectively, and achieved a favorable outcome. I highly recommend Damien for his exceptional work and expertise in this field.

If you are looking for an aggressive team of lawyers who will fight for you, Skidmore & Fomina is the firm to go with. Vera and Mason were compassionate towards my situation, attentive and diligent. Not only did they help me win my case, they did it quickly and stood their ground when it came time to negotiate and I walked away with a settlement that was very fair and in my favor. All in all - they were absolutely wonderful to work with!!

Greg did an amazing job of handling a very difficult case on my behalf. I will definitely be recommending him to anyone needing to engage a lawyer on their behalf. He kept my best interest at heart throughout and I’ll be forever thankful for his assistance!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Sasha!  We enjoyed representing you in your employment matter.  We know employment disputes can be stressful and we are glad that we were able to reach a positive and timely resolution.

reviews.text: Skidmore & Fomina has already made such a great impression in my eyes. I reached out to them looking to get advice on an employment contract review and Katie got in touch with me fairly quickly. She was able to walk me through the document and answer any questions I had. Would call them back in a heartbeat if I needed any assistance!

I had a big mess of a case involving state and federal statutes.
Vera, Damien, and Kaitlyn, helped out when nobody else would help, or could even understand it.

They were a pleasure to watch in court, and
I ended up getting an agreeable settlement. I'm grateful to have had them on my side, and can't recommend them enough.

They won't hide behind colorful euphemisms like other lawyers, they'll give it to you straight.

Katie and Vera are amazing women to work with!! They are compassionate, caring about their clients and put in many hours to ensure to get the wrong made right. If you're ever in a situation where you need an employment attorney this is law firm you want to represent you!!
From start to finish my expierence with Vera was great. She was very responsive and a great advocate on my behalf.

When I needed legal representation I was referred to Adler Giersch.  Even before I left the hospital after being hit by another driver Arthur Leritz, MaryEllen Bolden, Richard Adler and Elizabeth Ruff met with me per our request.  From the first visit to the conclusion of my case I felt continuous support.  The compassion, understanding and care from the first day helped me not only during my physical and emotional recovery as well as through the conclusion of the settlements.  I have peace with what was achieved due to their har work and letting no stone remain unturned.

Arthur and MaryEllen effectively communicated with me in person, virtually , as well as through texts and emails. Easy and wuick access to them helped me know I was not alone on this journey.  When  I needed additional resources they gave me quality referrals.  Being able to have a good raport was so critical to me.

Arthur would clearly explain options as well as the progress of my case. Many possible avenues for compenstaion were explored.  MaryEllen was amazing in tracking and dealing with the medical bills.  I am confident that they saved me money as well as put in many hours to deal with confusing billing.  This was another major asset of having hired Adler Giersch.  Arthur and MaryEllen made a very difficult situation more bearable for me.  I highly recommend Adler Giersch PS.

I'm incredibly grateful for Arthur Leritz and Maria Zanartu for their support throughout my case. It was complex, with many moving parts, yet everything was handled with care professionalism, and clear communication.  Having a team who truly had my back and acted as my voice lifted a huge burden off my shoulders and allowed me to focus on healing. Having never needed legal representation before, I now understand how important it is to have the right people by your side.

I can’t say enough about all the good things about Arthur Leritz, Heather Alius and Carol Fritsch! During my 3 years working with them, I felt assured, helped and recieved timely responses when I needed the most!

Although my accident was quite straight forward, but as I’m unfamiliar with the law and the insurance process navigating was quite challenging. I am so lucky to have have this firm! Everything that went wrong to process my insurance it did, from my own insurance’s paperwork and other party not responding—-but Arthur and team has helped me laid everything out straight and received the maximum settlement possible. I would definitely recommend this firm!

After being involved in two serious car accidents, I was referred to the law firm Adler & Giersch, P.S. and had the privilege of working closely with Attorney Arthur Leritz and Mary Ellen Bolden from his legal team. I feel truly fortunate to have had their representation. Arthur successfully settled both of my cases, ensuring that I received the maximum possible compensation for each accident.

My situation was complex, as the two accidents occurred a year apart and involved overlapping as well as new injuries. Navigating the legal challenges of separating and managing two claims required extensive knowledge and expertise—qualities Arthur and his team demonstrated throughout the process. Despite dealing with multiple parties, including L&I and several businesses, they remained persistent and professional, never losing focus on achieving the best outcome for me.

I deeply appreciated their honesty, transparency, and consistent communication. From the beginning, they made it clear that the process would take time but assured me that their diligence would pay off—and it absolutely did. The results exceeded my expectations, and their dedication went well beyond what most law firms provide.

Based on my experience, I can confidently say that Adler & Giersch, P.S. stands out as one of the best firms for personal injury cases. If you’re looking for a team that truly cares, keeps you informed, and works tirelessly on your behalf, I highly recommend them. You can trust them to handle the hard work so you can focus on healing.  Thank you Arthur and Mary Ellen.

I can’t say enough wonderful things about Arthur Leritz and Heather Aliulis. They provided exceptional representation after my truck accident and went above and beyond in every way. From the very beginning, they demonstrated genuine care, professionalism, and expertise. They took the time to explain each step of the process clearly, kept me informed throughout, and made me feel completely comfortable during a stressful time. Their communication was consistent, their guidance was reassuring, and their dedication was unwavering. Thanks to their hard work and skill, I received the maximum settlement possible. I am truly grateful for everything they did and would highly recommend them to anyone in need of compassionate and effective legal counsel.

I had a fantastic experience working with Arthur Leritz and his team. They coordinated seamlessly with another law office in a different state to ensure I was fully supported throughout the process. I truly felt well represented and informed every step of the way. Arthur and his staff were professional, attentive, and genuinely caring, which made a big difference. I am grateful for their help and would confidently recommend Arthur Leritz to anyone in need of legal assistance.

Andrea Huff

I was in a serious motor vehicle collision with brain, neck, back, hand, and leg injuries. I had extensive medical treatments, and a disability in my profession with loss of income.    I contacted several attorneys but I was not satisfied.  I was referred to Adler Giersch, and I received an immediate response from Richard Adler, and met soon thereafter with their legal team.   I was impressed, and I could tell after my first meeting they would represent me well.

I was introduced to Arthur Leritz, Maria, Elisabeth, and Rachel.   Arthur was understanding and helpful.  There were many times I was not up to dealing with the situation.  I was confident in Arthur and his team to handle my case.    He is knowledgeable, highly skilled, and an expert in personal injury law.  Arthur successfully dealt with the insurance companies, and he navigated the process well!     I appreciated that he responded to me promptly on my questions and requests.  I had several meetings with them on my progress, and they really helped me through the process.    Maria, Elisabeth, Rachel are exceptional and detailed in organizing and preparing legal documentation!  I’m pleased they achieved a settlement on the auto policy limits, and without litigation!

I have hired many lawyers over the years, and it’s not easy to find a good legal team.   Adler Giersch exceeded my expectations!   Their level of detail and expertise made the difference.  They are professionals and they care about their clients well being!  Thank you - Richard, Arthur, Maria, Elisabeth, Rachel, and the entire Adler Giersch Team!

I met Arthur Leritz from my hospital bed while recovering from extensive trauma that I suffered when a drunk driver smashed into my car on the freeway. He offered support in ways beyond what I would expect from an attorney. In the state I was in, it’s hard enough to focus on survival and recovery, let alone make tough decisions about how you might handle transactional matters such as litigation. He understood what limited capacity I had at that time and remained patient, compassionate, and incredibly kind. In addition to thoroughly answering every question my family and I asked, he gave me resources to understand the path ahead of me, and was effective in validating all of my complicated feelings. He made sure we knew we could contact him with any questions and concerns that came up. Their team immediately went to work contacting people, building reports, and starting the tedious journey of record-keeping. Through all the setbacks and painful complications in my case and my life, Adler Giersch simplified everything for me. They built a robust case with reports from specialists that were pivotal for my lawsuit, and also helped me with medical referrals and recommendations when I felt I needed it, aided in my search for a new career path post-injury, and have always empowered me to make the best decisions for myself. Arthur, Sabrina, Jacob, and Debbie all demonstrated consistent compassion, knowledge, and experience and successfully helped me navigate my case to its conclusion. I would not hesitate to recommend Arthur and the Adler Giersch team to anyone going through something similar.

While recovering from a head injury concussion caused by being hit as a pedestrian, I was rear-ended several months later, which exacerbated my neck and head pain. I was already finding it difficult to deal with two different insurance companies, which also made my headaches, ability to focus and  concentration on healing very challenging.  My physical therapist's office referred me to the Law Office of Adler/Griesch, and turned out to be a god-send decision. When Attorney Arthur D. Leritz and his team took over, it felt like the weight of the world had been lifted from my shoulders. For a whole year and a half, I was able to focus on healing while in physical therapy for my head, neck, back, wrist, and knees. I no longer had to deal with the stress of communicating with several and various insurance agents ( a few who were not always honest and/or pressuring me to close my claim immediately), the complicated legal issues of dual claims, or the billing from several medical clinics.   Arthur and Heather Aliulis are not only professional and genuinely caring, but they also took care of everything and negotiated a good settlement, including any final medical bills; such assistance contributed to my overall well-being emotionally and financially.  I highly recommend the Law Office of Adler/Griesch for help with personal injury or complicated accident claims.

I highly recommend the law firm of Adler Giersch to anyone in need of a personal injury attorney. Arthur Leritz and his team, including Sabrina, kept me informed every step of the way and obtained a great settlement on my behalf. I could not have been more satisfied with their legal representation and attention to detail. They made me feel assured about my case with their legal advocacy and were always available to answer any questions I had.

I worked with Arthur and his associates on a settlement for personal injury from dog attack.  They outlined reasonable expectations and timelines, were excellent at keeping me informed on progress, and negotiated with medical and home owners insurances.  I couldn't have done all that on top of healing from my injuries.  I can highly recommend their services and love the convenient Issaquah location.

I worked with Arthur and Elisabeth after an injury from getting hit by a car. Highly recommend! They were very nice, professional, and walked me through every single step, and handled all the difficult negotiating/insurance talks. The final settlement was much much larger than I expected (even after their share), and I'll be forever grateful to them for that.

If six stars was an option I'd be giving six. After being rear ended on the freeway,  I contacted Adler Giersch PS and was introduced to Arthur Leritz and Heather Aliulis.  From day one they were diligent and attentive and treated me as if I was there only case.  Always available to answer my questions and alleviate my concerns.  I couldn't be more grateful for their help.  The final settlement was the maximum available per the policy.  A substantial amount.  I couldn't be more sincere in recommending Adler Giersch.
Don Frothingham

I received a recommendation from a friend to contact Adler Giersch in regards to my motor vehicle accident claim, and I am so glad I did! My team of Arthur and Sabrina were amazing. They were expeditious, friendly and warm. At no point did I ever feel uncomfortable or that they were doing anything that I was not aware of. Their communication was precise and clear. I would 100% recommend them to anyone in need of a personal injury attorney.

My team of Arthur and Jenny really listened to me.  My first request was to get insurance adjusters to leave me alone so I could focus on my recovery.  When I was at my most vulnerable and had seemingly everyone involved trying to trick or coerce me into making false statements, my team eliminated that stress.  Even when it became apparent the at-fault party had very little insurance or assets, Arthur left no stone unturned in getting the maximum possible settlement for me.  I hope to never need personal injury legal services again.  But if I do, I’ll be calling Adler Giersch without hesitation.

I was involved in a motor vehicle accident which resulted in the other driver being at fault in a head on collision.  After spending time receiving medical treatment for my injuries I was contacted by the driver’s insurance company pushing me to close my claim.  In addition, my insurance company was pushing to close my claim as well.  I had never been in a motor vehicle accident and felt at a loss as to my next steps.  My chiropractor recommended I contact attorney, Arthur Leritz.
After my consultation with Arthur, I felt at ease and confident in hiring him as my attorney.  Arthur was professional, caring, and knowledgeable giving me a sense of relief.  I was able to focus on healing while he took care of my legal concerns.
My gratitude and thanks to Arthur and my case manager, Heather Aliulis for going above and beyond what I had hoped for.  I highly recommend hiring Arthur Leritz and will be referring my friends who are in need of legal representation.

I had a great couple of attorneys that made this experience so positive and easier to handle. They were compassionate, knowledgeable and kind. Actually, the entire team was wonderful. No matter how many times I contacted them they were very patient, professional and truly understood my health and emotional situation. They were very successful attaining my compensation for the car accident. I highly recommend this team at the Everett location.
My thanks and gratitude to Arthur Leritz, Attorney and Jenny Lacobucci, Paralegal for their excellent performance in handling my case.

Arthur Leritz was fantastic. When a roof collapsed from under me I broke my ankle and was out of work for several months. Arthur was very knowledgeable in this injury case helping and fighting on my behalf for my settlement. I talked with a couple of attorneys prior and I knew Arthur had my best interest as a priority. I would highly recommend Adler Giersch over any of the ones you hear on the radio.

Was hit by a pickup truck in a crosswalk in May 2023, contacted
them a couple months later.  They were very professional, and I was pleased with my settlement.

The whole process of dealing with a stressful event being involved in a MVA became stress free after consulting with both attorneys, Elisabeth Ruff and Richard Adler.
Excellent communication and advice.
They were able to reach a settlement beyond my expectations.
I highly recommend them when involved in any type of injury.

February 26, 2024

I contacted this office back in 2021 after a car accident. This was the best I was so confused at first because they wouldn't sign me as a client. They told me "we don't want to take money out of your pocket" How ever they navigated me through the process to get the most for my car. After all my treatment was done we talked and determined that I needed an attorney. They fought tooth and nail for me. I can't express how much I appreciate all they did. Hopefully I won't need a lawyer again, but if I do this is my place to go. More lawyers need to be like this.

I am happy I found Adler Giersch following my car wreck.  The other insurance company just kept pushing and I didn't know how to solve the situation.  A constant major migraine including difficulty processing due to the accident didn't help.  Richard Adler was a Godsend after my accident.  Not only did Richard take care of all legal concerns, he was an advocate for my health.  He truly listened and encouraged me to seek out answers from the best health professionals in the area of Traumatic Brain Injury. Richard really cares about me and believes in my recovery.  Adler Giersch is very professional and successfully settled my legal case.

Lauren Adler embodies everything that anyone could ever want in an attorney. She is knowledgeable, calm, collected and fierce when it comes to getting the job done. She listens to your needs and helps you relax during an extremely tough time. She did a great job keeping me updated as my case proceeded but always knew when to allow me to focus on my demanding profession without overwhelming me with the minor details of the case. Lauren and the entire firm truly became family in this process. I appreciate all the hard work and dedication that was given on my case. If you’re ever needing representation for any personal injury case, look no further... Lauren is your girl!

A calm and professional advocate

I highly recommend hiring Lauren Adler if you are ever in the unfortunate position of needing to deal with a personal injury claim. She and her firm were calm, but fierce advocates on my behalf and dealt with all of the details involved with my claim. I was able to focus on my healing knowing the rest was in her capable hands. In addition, Lauren and her firm have so much experience that she could recommend health professionals and services that I would never have known about to help in that healing. Do not hesitate to hire Lauren to help you, she is terrific!

Sometimes one has to be just lucky in finding the best professional. Boy was I "lucky." Lauren Adler was amazing in her determination to get me a favorable settlement from the insurer of the idiot who T-boned me while texting. She would not let them off the hook and pressed them to the wall. She is not shy and she is a big advocate for her clients. Cannot recommend her enough. I am referring any of my friends needing her services right to her and her firm.

My experience with Adler Giersch has been beyond my wildest expectations. Absolute game-changer. After I was rear ended by a semi truck I was out of work for quite a while and with my injury returning to work wasn't any easier. While I was healing and trying to get my life back Richard Adler and MaryEllen Bolden handled my case beyond what I could have expected. They made sure that everything was taken care of and it allowed me to focus on healing. They kept me informed so I wasn't left wondering. I didn't know this at the time but I'm sure things went so smoothly because I had hired the best Attorney on the West Coast if not the entire country. They know what they are doing, and aren't afraid to show you that they care about you too. As a family man I am forever grateful for what Richard and MaryEllen have done for me and my family.

Jeffrey coats is one of the few lawyers I've ever met that cares about his clients. If I or anyone else I know gets injured he's the first person I will call don't waste your time with any other lawyer
reviews.ownerResponse:
Hi Stephen,

Thank you so much for your kind words and trust in our services. I'm truly honored to know that you felt cared for during your time with us. Clients like you make it easy. You were always available and responsive. Your recommendation means a lot, and we're here to help if you or anyone you know needs assistance in the future. Wishing you all the best!

Warm regards,
Jeffrey D. Coats

reviews.text:
I would highly recommend hiring Mr. Coats as an attorney for your legal needs.   I was in a bind after purchasing a “lemon” of a vehicle when Jeff swooped in to help me arbitrate, taking over my case when I was up against a wall.  His knowledge of relevant case law, his approach to my case and how he handled challenges along the way were highly professional and his drive to get to a speedy resolution (a WIN) went above and beyond the call of duty.    Jeff’s availability or quick response time if busy (even when on vacation) is prompt.  His  respectful and courteous  nature at all times made me feel comfortable, easing my anxiety when I needed it most.    I wouldn’t have gotten the best case results possible without his support.

Thank you from the bottom of my heart, Jeff!

reviews.text:
Jeff is compassionate, professional, caring, thorough and EXTREMELY knowledgeable
Jeff has been our lawyer for years and we wouldn’t have anyone else.  If you are wanting to ensure your wishes are followed to the ‘T’ and you don’t want to worry about anything for your family in the future - then Jeff is who you have on your side
reviews.ownerResponse: Lorna; you and your family are a pleasure to work with. I appreciate the kind words.

reviews.text: Mr. Coats explained everything clearly, kept us updated on what was happening, and helped us make informed decisions based off his experience. We had a great outcome.
reviews.ownerResponse: Megan; I am happy you are pleased with the outcome. Your patience and willingness to let the process work really helped to get things done.

reviews.text: I had an amazing experience working with Jeff after a rollover accident. He was sincere and empathetic and very knowledgeable in navigating all the legal and medical concerns during a stressful time. He does amazing work and I highly recommend his services.
reviews.ownerResponse: Mariel; Thank you. All we can do is help you with the claim. You  have to endure the pain and hardship of the healing process. My hope is you continue to improve and one day you no longer have to deal with the consequences.
Thank you for the kind words. Always my pleasure to work with you and your family.
